text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
With the combination of the antioxidant 
properties of polyphenols and the energy 
in sugar, sweetened tea is the ideal energy 
drink…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Personally, I would like to add a tad more 
sugar for a more delectable experience, 
but well… I doubt there's enough liquid 
to fully dissolve any additional sugar.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll just have to grin and bear it… No. 
Why should I confine myself to the restraints
of tea and sugar's current solubility?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The heretofore unknown, the yet undetermined 
possibilities! I shall surpass the limits of 
solubility… and reach peak sugar levels!
